sn7.12:1.1: At Sāvatthī. Then, in the morning, the Blessed One dressed and, taking bowl and robe, approached the residence of the brahmin Udaya. Then the brahmin Udaya filled the Blessed One's bowl with rice. A second time in the morning the Blessed One dressed and, taking bowl and robe, approached the residence of the brahmin Udaya … . A third time in the morning the Blessed One dressed and, taking bowl and robe, approached the residence of the brahmin Udaya.Then a third time the brahmin Udaya filled the Blessed One's bowl with rice,sn.i.174after which he said to the Blessed One: "This pesky ascetic Gotama keeps coming again and again."
sn7.12:6.1: When this was said, the brahmin Udaya said to the Blessed One : "Magnificent, Master Gotama! Magnificent, Master Gotama! … Let Master Gotama remember me as a lay follower Gotama!… Let Master Gotama remember me as a lay follower who from today has gone for refuge for life."
